attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT                     
                  CAST(SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.INCIDENT_NUMBER AS BIGINT) AS INCIDENT_NUMBER,
                   ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.ORDER_NUMBER,
                   Ord_ProductsNow.PRODUCT_FAMILY,
                   Ord_ActShipDateCal.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
                   SUM (ORDER_LINES_FACT.STD_COST_EXT_USD_AMT) AS STD_COST_EXT_USD_AMT,
				   Ord_CustomerSite.CUST_COUNTRY AS COUNTRY,  
				   Ord_CustomerSite.CUST_THEATER AS THEATER, 
                   Ord_CurrentContract.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
				   Ord_CurrentContract.CONTRACT_TYPE AS CONTRACT_SERVICE_LINE, --needto use CONTRACT_TYPE column
                   Ord_ProductsThen.ITEM_NAME,
                   Ord_SvcLvlCont.SERVICE_GROUP_CODE Cont_SERVICE_GROUP_CODE,
                   SUM (ORDER_LINES_FACT.SHIPPED_QUANTITY) SHIPPED_QUANTITY,
				   Ord_SvcLvlReqs.SERVICE_GROUP_CODE,
				   SUM (ORDER_LINES_FACT.GBL_LIST_PRICE_EXT_USD_AMT) AS GBL_LIST_PRICE_EXT_USD_AMT,
                   Ord_ActShipDateCal.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
                   SR_Type.CODE,
                   SR_Ent_Customer.CUST_MARKET_SEG_NAME,
				   'unknown' AS PARTY_NAME,
				   Ord_ProductsNow.PRODUCT_FAMILY,
                   ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.FAILURE_CODE,
                   SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.INCIDENT_STATUS,
                   SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.CLOSED_DATE,
				   MAX(Ord_ActShipDateCal.CALENDAR_DATE)
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_CURRENT_F_V SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_SITES_MAPS_V SR_Customer
			ON (SR_Customer.BL_SITE_KEY = SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.BL_CUSTOMER_KEY)
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_LOOKUPS_D SR_Type
			ON (SR_Type.BL_LOOKUP_KEY = SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.INCIDENT_TYPE_KEY)
			AND SR_Type.CODE IN ('TAC', 'SVO', 'SMB', 'ANC')
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_ORDER_HEADERS_F_V ORDER_HEADERS_FACT
			ON (SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.INCIDENT_ID = ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.INCIDENT_ID
			AND ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE = 'CUSTOMER')
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_ORDER_LINES_F_V ORDER_LINES_FACT
			ON (ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.HEADER_ID = ORDER_LINES_FACT.HEADER_ID)
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_CALENDARS_D Ord_ActShipDateCal
			ON (ORDER_LINES_FACT.ACTUAL_SHIP_DATE_CALENDAR_KEY = Ord_ActShipDateCal.BL_CALENDAR_KEY)
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_PRODUCTS_D Ord_ProductsThen
			ON (ORDER_LINES_FACT.PRODUCT_KEY = Ord_ProductsThen.PRODUCT_KEY)
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_PRODUCTS_D Ord_ProductsNow
			ON ORDER_LINES_FACT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = Ord_ProductsNow.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
			AND Ord_ProductsNow.ACTIVE_FLAG = 'Y'
		INNER JOIN (SELECT  DISTINCT BL_LOOKUP_KEY,BL_ATTRIBUTE2 AS LINE_CATEGORY  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_LOOKUPS_D 
						WHERE LOOKUP_TYPE IN ('TSI_OE_LINE_TXN_TYPES',
                          'Error',
                          'Not Available',
                          'Not Applicable')
					) Ord_LineTxnType
			ON (ORDER_LINES_FACT.LINE_TYPE_LKP_KEY = Ord_LineTxnType.BL_LOOKUP_KEY)
			AND Ord_LineTxnType.LINE_CATEGORY = 'ORDER'   
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_EDW_C3_CONTRACTS_D Ord_CurrentContract
			ON (Ord_CurrentContract.BL_CONTRACT_KEY = ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.CONTRACT_KEY)                
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_SITES_MAPS_V Ord_CustomerSite
			ON (Ord_CustomerSite.BL_SITE_KEY = ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.CUST_SITE_KEY)                   
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_SERVICE_LEVELS_D Ord_SvcLvlCont
			ON (Ord_SvcLvlCont.BL_SERVICE_LEVEL_KEY = ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.CONTRACTUAL_SERVICE_LEVEL_KEY)
		INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_SERVICE_LEVELS_D Ord_SvcLvlReqs
			ON (Ord_SvcLvlReqs.BL_SERVICE_LEVEL_KEY = ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.REQUESTED_SERVICE_LEVEL_KEY)
		INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT BL_LOOKUP_KEY, BL_ATTRIBUTE2 AS LINE_CATEGORY,   (CASE WHEN bl_lookup_key = -777 THEN CODE ELSE CASE WHEN bl_lookup_key = -888 THEN CODE ELSE CASE WHEN bl_lookup_key = -999 THEN CODE  ELSE  BL_ATTRIBUTE3 END  END END) AS TRANSACTION_SOURCE  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_LOOKUPS_D 
						WHERE LOOKUP_TYPE IN ('TSI_OE_ORDER_TXN_TYPES',
                          'Error',
                          'Not Available',
                          'Not Applicable')
					) Ord_TxnType
			ON (Ord_TxnType.BL_LOOKUP_KEY = ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.ORDER_TYPE_LKP_KEY)
			AND Ord_TxnType.TRANSACTION_SOURCE = 'CUSTOMER'
		LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_CUST_SITE_REF_D SR_Ent_Customer
			ON (SR_Ent_Customer.CUSTOMER_ID = SR_Customer.PARTY_ID
			AND SR_Ent_Customer.ADDRESS_LOCATION_ID = SR_Customer.PARTY_SITE_ID)

	WHERE 
	/*	CAST(SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.INCIDENT_NUMBER AS BIGINT) NOT IN 
		(SELECT DISTINCT SR_NUMBER FROM STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID = 204)	
		AND*/ 
		(Ord_ActShipDateCal.FISCAL_MONTH_ID  = (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT-1 FROM STGDB_DV4.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) OR
                       Ord_ActShipDateCal.FISCAL_MONTH_ID  = (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM STGDB_DV4.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID))
		
		
		--CAST(Ord_ActShipDateCal.CALENDAR_DATE AS TIMESTAMP  FORMAT 'YYYY/MM/DD HH:MI:SS') BETWEEN '2017/07/26 23:59:53 ' AND '2017/08/23 23:59:56'
      
		
 GROUP BY  INCIDENT_NUMBER,
                   ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.ORDER_NUMBER,
                   Ord_ProductsNow.PRODUCT_FAMILY,
                   Ord_ActShipDateCal.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
                   COUNTRY,
                   THEATER,
                   Ord_CurrentContract.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
                   CONTRACT_SERVICE_LINE,
                   Ord_ProductsThen.ITEM_NAME,
                   Ord_SvcLvlCont.SERVICE_GROUP_CODE,
                   Ord_SvcLvlReqs.SERVICE_GROUP_CODE,
                   Ord_ActShipDateCal.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
                   SR_Type.CODE,
                   SR_Ent_Customer.CUST_MARKET_SEG_NAME,
                   PARTY_NAME,
                   Ord_ProductsNow.PRODUCT_FAMILY,
                   ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.FAILURE_CODE,
                   SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.INCIDENT_STATUS,
                   SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.CLOSED_DATE
            HAVING     SUM (ORDER_LINES_FACT.STD_COST_EXT_USD_AMT) <> 0
                   AND SUM (ORDER_LINES_FACT.GBL_LIST_PRICE_EXT_USD_AMT) <> 0
                   AND SUM (ORDER_LINES_FACT.SHIPPED_QUANTITY) <> 0

UNION

        SELECT    
              CAST(SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.INCIDENT_NUMBER AS BIGINT) AS INCIDENT_NUMBER ,
               CAST (ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.ORDER_NUMBER AS BIGINT) AS ORDER_NUMBER,
               Ord_ProductsNow.PRODUCT_FAMILY,
               Ord_ActShipDateCal.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
               SUM (ORDER_LINES_FACT.STD_COST_EXT_USD_AMT),
               Ord_CustomerSite.CUST_COUNTRY AS COUNTRY,  
			   Ord_CustomerSite.CUST_THEATER AS THEATER,
               Ord_CurrentContract.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
               Ord_CurrentContract.CONTRACT_TYPE AS CONTRACT_SERVICE_LINE,
               Ord_ProductsThen.ITEM_NAME,
               Ord_SvcLvlCont.SERVICE_GROUP_CODE,
               SUM (ORDER_LINES_FACT.SHIPPED_QUANTITY),
               Ord_SvcLvlReqs.SERVICE_GROUP_CODE,
               SUM (ORDER_LINES_FACT.GBL_LIST_PRICE_EXT_USD_AMT),
               Ord_ActShipDateCal.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
               SR_Type.CODE,
               SR_Ent_Customer.CUST_MARKET_SEG_NAME,
               'unknown' AS PARTY_NAME,
               Ord_ProductsNow.PRODUCT_FAMILY,
               ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.FAILURE_CODE,
               SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.INCIDENT_STATUS,
               SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.CLOSED_DATE,
			   MAX(Ord_ActShipDateCal.CALENDAR_DATE)
          FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_CURRENT_F_V SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT
		  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_SITES_MAPS_V SR_Customer
		  ON (SR_Customer.BL_SITE_KEY = SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.BL_CUSTOMER_KEY)
		  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_LOOKUPS_D SR_Type
		  ON (SR_Type.BL_LOOKUP_KEY = SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.INCIDENT_TYPE_KEY)
		  AND SR_Type.CODE IN ('TAC', 'SVO', 'SMB', 'ANC')
          INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_ORDER_HEADERS_F_V ORDER_HEADERS_FACT
		  ON (SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.INCIDENT_ID = ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.INCIDENT_ID
                    AND ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE = 'CUSTOMER')
		  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_ORDER_LINES_F_V ORDER_LINES_FACT
		  ON (ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.HEADER_ID = ORDER_LINES_FACT.HEADER_ID)
		  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_CALENDARS_D Ord_ActShipDateCal
		  ON (ORDER_LINES_FACT.ACTUAL_SHIP_DATE_CALENDAR_KEY = Ord_ActShipDateCal.BL_CALENDAR_KEY)
		  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_SERVICE_LEVELS_D Ord_SvcLvlCont
		  ON (Ord_SvcLvlCont.BL_SERVICE_LEVEL_KEY = ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.CONTRACTUAL_SERVICE_LEVEL_KEY)
          INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_PRODUCTS_D Ord_ProductsNow
          ON (ORDER_LINES_FACT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = Ord_ProductsNow.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
               AND (Ord_ProductsNow.ACTIVE_FLAG = 'Y')     
          INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_SITES_MAPS_V Ord_CustomerSite
		  ON (Ord_CustomerSite.BL_SITE_KEY = ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.CUST_SITE_KEY)
		  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_EDW_C3_CONTRACTS_D Ord_CurrentContract
		  ON (Ord_CurrentContract.BL_CONTRACT_KEY = ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.CONTRACT_KEY)
          INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_PRODUCTS_D Ord_ProductsThen 
		  ON  (ORDER_LINES_FACT.PRODUCT_KEY = Ord_ProductsThen.PRODUCT_KEY)  
          INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_SERVICE_LEVELS_D Ord_SvcLvlReqs
			ON (Ord_SvcLvlReqs.BL_SERVICE_LEVEL_KEY = ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.REQUESTED_SERVICE_LEVEL_KEY)
          LEFT JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_CUST_SITE_REF_D SR_Ent_Customer  
			ON (SR_Ent_Customer.CUSTOMER_ID= SR_Customer.PARTY_ID
                    AND SR_Ent_Customer.ADDRESS_LOCATION_ID = SR_Customer.PARTY_SITE_ID)			  
               
         WHERE (Ord_ActShipDateCal.FISCAL_MONTH_ID  = (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT-1 FROM STGDB_DV4.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) OR
                       Ord_ActShipDateCal.FISCAL_MONTH_ID  = (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM STGDB_DV4.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)) 

--CAST(Ord_ActShipDateCal.CALENDAR_DATE AS TIMESTAMP  FORMAT 'YYYY/MM/DD HH:MI:SS') BETWEEN '2017/07/26 23:59:53 ' AND '2017/08/23 23:59:56'
--AND (   CAST(SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.INCIDENT_NUMBER AS BIGINT) , CAST (ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.ORDER_NUMBER AS BIGINT) ) NOT IN (  SELECT DISTINCT SR_NUMBER, ORDER_NUMBER FROM OPS_RMA_204)
 
--AND  ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.ORDER_NUMBER = 87991680 

          GROUP BY INCIDENT_NUMBER,
                   ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.ORDER_NUMBER,
                   Ord_ProductsNow.PRODUCT_FAMILY,
                   Ord_ActShipDateCal.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
                   COUNTRY,
                   THEATER,
                   Ord_CurrentContract.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
                   CONTRACT_SERVICE_LINE,
                   Ord_ProductsThen.ITEM_NAME,
                   Ord_SvcLvlCont.SERVICE_GROUP_CODE,
                   Ord_SvcLvlReqs.SERVICE_GROUP_CODE,
                   Ord_ActShipDateCal.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
                   SR_Type.CODE,
                   SR_Ent_Customer.CUST_MARKET_SEG_NAME,
                   PARTY_NAME,
                   Ord_ProductsNow.PRODUCT_FAMILY,
                   ORDER_HEADERS_FACT.FAILURE_CODE,
                   SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.INCIDENT_STATUS,
                   SERVICE_REQUEST_FACT.CLOSED_DATE
            HAVING     SUM (ORDER_LINES_FACT.STD_COST_EXT_USD_AMT) <> 0
                   AND SUM (ORDER_LINES_FACT.GBL_LIST_PRICE_EXT_USD_AMT) <> 0
                   AND SUM (ORDER_LINES_FACT.SHIPPED_QUANTITY) <> 0

SELECT SR_NUMBER
        ,FISCAL_MONTH_ID
        ,ORDER_NUMBER
        ,PRODUCT_FAMILY
        ,FISCAL_SHIP_QUARTER
        ,EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST
        ,SITE_COUNTRY
        ,SITE_THEATER
        ,ORDER_SA_NUMBER
        ,ORDER_SA_SERVICE_LINE
        ,PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
        ,CONTRACTED_SERVICE_GROUP
        ,QUANTITY_SHIPPED
        ,REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP
        ,EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE
        ,SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH
        ,CASE WHEN SR_TYPE ='Not Available'THEN 'N/A'ELSE SR_TYPE END AS SR_TYPE
        ,LOOKUP_THEATER
        ,CREATED_DATE
        ,CASE WHEN UPPER(CUST_MKT_SEGMENT)IN ('UNKNOWN CUSTOMER MARKET SEGMENT','UNKNOWN','')
		        THEN NULL
			  ELSE UPPER(CUST_MKT_SEGMENT) END AS CUST_MKT_SEGMENT
        ,CASE WHEN SITE_CUST_NAME ='UNKNOWN'
		        THEN NULL
			  ELSE SITE_CUST_NAME END AS SITE_CUST_NAME
		,ENT_PRODUCT_FAMILY		
		,FAILURE_CODE
		,INCIDENT_STATUS
        ,CLOSED_DATE
		,SHIP_DATE
   FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_INTERIM
   WHERE 
   /* Below filter added while doing validation in order to restrict the previous sr #s start*/
   SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH =  (SEL FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
	/* Below filter added while doing validation in order to restrict the previous sr #s start*/						   
     AND SR_NUMBER > 0
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SR_NUMBER, 
          ORDER_NUMBER,
           PRODUCT_FAMILY, 
           FISCAL_SHIP_QUARTER,
           SITE_COUNTRY, 
           SITE_THEATER, 
           ORDER_SA_NUMBER, 
                       ORDER_SA_SERVICE_LINE,
                        PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER, 
                        CONTRACTED_SERVICE_GROUP, 
                        QUANTITY_SHIPPED, 
                        REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP,
                       SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH, 
                       SR_TYPE, CUST_MKT_SEGMENT, 
                       SITE_CUST_NAME,
                       FAILURE_CODE,
                       INCIDENT_STATUS,  LOOKUP_THEATER , ENT_PRODUCT_FAMILY, FAILURE_CODE
   							
								  ORDER BY   SR_NUMBER, SHIP_DATE  ASC) = 1
